revision.text:
[[de:Dekanlisten A1]] In {{ill|Egyptology|en|Egyptology|qid=Q145903|lt=Egyptology|1=Egyptology}}, the '''A1 Decan Lists''' refer to those {{ill|Diagonal star clocks|de|Diagonalsternuhr|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clocks|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clocks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clocks|qid=Q142353|1=Star clock}} that, in contrast to the {{ill|A2 Decan Lists|de|Dekanlisten A2|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/A2 Decan Lists|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/A2 Decan Lists|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/A2 Decan Lists|qid=Q1183635|1=A2 Decan Lists}}, begin with the {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|lt=Decan star|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|lt_de=Dekanstern|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qid=Q804527}} ''{{ill|Temat-heret|de|Temat-heret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|qid=Q1549527|1=Temat-heret}}''. The A1 Decan Lists are documented on 10 coffins from the {{ill|Eleventh Dynasty of Egypt|en|Eleventh Dynasty of Egypt|qid=Q719634|lt=Eleventh Dynasty of Egypt|1=Eleventh Dynasty of Egypt}} and {{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qid=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}, originating from {{ill|Asyut|en|Asyut|qid=Q29962|lt=Asyut|1=Asyut}}, {{ill|Thebes, Egypt|en|Thebes, Egypt|qid=Q101583|lt=Thebes (Egypt)|1=Thebes, Egypt}}, {{ill|Gebelein|en|Gebelein|qid=Q1496830|lt=Gebelein|1=Gebelein}}, and {{ill|Aswan|en|Aswan|qid=Q29888|lt=Aswan|1=Aswan}}. The distribution of this type of decan list likely began in Asyut, as only in {{ill|Upper Egypt|en|Upper Egypt|qid=Q203751|lt=Upper Egypt|1=Upper Egypt}} and Asyut does the rare introductory form of a specific offering formula appear on the corresponding coffins. == Reconstruction of the A1 Decans == {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; border: 2px solid gray;" |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} |colspan="12" style="text-align:center; background:#FFE39B"|'''Reconstruction of the A1 Decans''' |- {{Ägyptologie TblHighlight|qq=}} ! Decan No. || {{ill|Egyptian hieroglyphs|en|Egyptian hieroglyphs|qid=Q132659|lt=Egyptian hieroglyphs|1=Egyptian hieroglyphs}} || Ancient Egyptian Name || Translation |- | style="text-align:center"|35 | t:T13-D2:t N14-N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Temat-heret|de|Temat-heret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-heret|qid=Q1549527|1=Temat-heret}}
''Tm3t-ḥrt'' | ''Upper of the Mat'' |- | style="text-align:center"|36 | t:T13-W12-D21:t N14-N33*N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Temat-cheret|de|Temat-cheret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Temat-cheret|qid=Q2402466|1=Temat-cheret}}
''Tm3t-ẖrt'' | ''Lower of the Mat'' |- | style="text-align:center"|1 | G43-M8:t*Z1*Z1 D58-D28:t*Z4 N14-N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Weschati-Bekati|de|Weschati-Bekati|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Weschati-Bekati|qid=Q1339483|1=Weschati-Bekati}}
''Wš3tj-Bk3tj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|2 | | {{ill|Ipdjes|de|Ipdjes|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipdjes|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipdjes|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipdjes|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Jpds'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|3 | =S29-D58 N33*N33:V13 N14 | {{ill|Sebschesen|de|Sebschesen|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sebschesen|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sebschesen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sebschesen|qid=Q2263469|1=Sebschesen}}
''Sbẖs'' | ''The Surrounding One'' |- | style="text-align:center"|4 | W17:t*t D2 D21:t N14-N33-N33:N33 | {{ill|Chentet-heret|de|Chentet-heret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-heret|qid=Q1070111|1=Chentet-heret}}
''Ḫntt-ḥrt'' | ''Upper of the Ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"|5 | W17:t*t W12 D21:t N14-N33:N33-N33 | {{ill|Chentet-cheret|de|Chentet-cheret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chentet-cheret|qid=Q1070112|1=Chentet-cheret}}
''Ḫntt-ẖrt'' | ''Lower of the Ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"|6 | D21-M17-M17 W17:t*t N14-N33-N33-N33 | {{ill|Tjemes-ni-chentet|de|Tjemes-ni-chentet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tjemes-ni-chentet|qid=Q2803584|1=Tjemes-ni-chentet}}
''Tjms-nj-ḫntt'' | ''The Red of the Ship'' |- | style="text-align:center"|7 | | {{ill|Qedeti|de|Qedeti|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qedeti|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qedeti|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qedeti|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Qdtj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|8 | T19-T19 N14 N33:N33 | {{ill|Septi-chenwi|de|Septi-chenwi|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Septi-chenwi|qid=Q2271782|1=Septi-chenwi}}
''Ḫnwj'' | ''Fish'' |- | style="text-align:center"|9 | D2-W7-P3 N14 N33*N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Heri-ab-wia|de|Heri-ab-wia|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heri-ab-wia|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḥrj-3b-wj3'' | ''The One in the Middle of the Bark'' |- | style="text-align:center"|10 | | | ''Crew'' |- | style="text-align:center"|11 | V31:n:n:n N14-N33-N33-N33 | {{ill|Kenemu|de|Kenemu|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenemu|qid=Q1738727|1=Kenemu}}
''Knmw'' | ''The Dark One'' |- | style="text-align:center"|12 | S29-m-D46 D13 E11 N14 N33 | {{ill|Semed-seret|de|Semed-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Semed-seret|qid=Q1621224|1=Semed-seret}}
''Smd-srt'' | ''Eyebrow of the Sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"|13 | S29-D21:t-F8 N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33 | {{ill|Seret (Decan)|de|Seret (Dekan)|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seret (Decan)|qid=Q2272336|1=Seret (Decan)}}
''Srt'' | ''Sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"|14 | V17-G43-M17 E11 N14-N33:N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Sawi-seret|de|Sawi-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawi-seret|qid=Q2228296|1=Sawi-seret}}
''S3wj-srt'' | ''Flank of the Sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"|15 | W12:D21-Aa1*p:D46 E11 N14-N33 | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-seret|de|Cheri-cheped-seret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-seret|qid=Q1070224|1=Cheri-cheped-seret}}
''Ḫrj-ḫpd-srt'' | ''The One at the Rear of the Sheep'' |- | style="text-align:center"|16 | D1*p:D36*Z1 G25-Aa1:N14-N33*N33 | {{ill|Tepi-a-achui|de|Tepi-a-achui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-achui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-achui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tepi-a-achui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Tpj-ˁ-3ẖwj'' | ''First of the Mighty One'' |- | style="text-align:center"|17 | | {{ill|Imi-chet-achui|de|Imi-chet-achui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imi-chet-achui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imi-chet-achui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imi-chet-achui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Jmj-ḫt-3ẖwj'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|18 | G25-Aa1:N14-N33*N33:N33 | {{ill|Achui|de|Achui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''3ẖwj'' | ''The Mighty One'' |- | style="text-align:center"|19 | G29-G29-G43-N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Baui|de|Baui|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baui|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''B3wj'' | ''The {{ill|Ba (Egyptian mythology)|de|Ba (ägyptische Mythologie)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian mythology)|qid=Q1129404|lt=Bas|1=Ba (Egyptian soul)}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"|20 | Aa28-Aa28 N14-N33-N33 | {{ill|Qed (Decan)|de|Qed (Dekan)|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qed (Decan)|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Qd'' | ''Children (Souls)'' |- | style="text-align:center"|21 | M12-M12-M12 N14-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33:N33:N33-N33:N33:N33-N33:N33 | {{ill|Chau (Decan)|de|Chau (Dekan)|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chau (Decan)|qid=Q1068317|1=Chau (Decan)}}
''ẖ3w'' | ''Thousands (?)'' |- | style="text-align:center"|22 | D36:D21 X1:N33 N14-N33:N33 | {{ill|Iaret|lt=Aret|de|Iaret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iaret|qid=Q1655707|1=Iaret}}
''ˁrt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|23 | | {{ill|Cheri-aret|de|Cheri-aret|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-aret|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-aret|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-aret|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḫrj-ˁrt'' | ''???'' |- | style="text-align:center"|24 | D36:Z1 D2:D21 N14-N33 | {{ill|Remen-heri|de|Remen-heri|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Remen-heri|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Rmn-ḥrj'' | ''Upper Arm (of {{ill|Sah (constellation)|de|Sah (Sternbild)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sah (constellation)|qid=Q2211961|lt=Sah|1=Sah (constellation)}})'' |- | style="text-align:center"|29 | R8-M44-t:N14 N33:N33*N33 | {{ill|Sopdet (constellation)|de|Sopdet (Sternbild)|lt=Sopdet|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sopdet (constellation)|qid=Q1418302|1=Sopdet (constellation)}}
''Spdt'' | ''Sopdet'' |- | style="text-align:center"|30 | V31:n-t G14-N14-N33*N33*N33:N33*N33*N33 | {{ill|Kenmet (Decan)|de|Kenmet (Dekan)|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmet (Decan)|qid=Q1632718|1=Kenmet (Decan)}}
''Knm.t'' | ''The One Who Pleases the Goddess {{ill|Mut|en|Mut|qid=Q29409|lt=Mut|1=Mut}}'' |- | style="text-align:center"|32 | W12:D21-Aa1*p:D46-n:V31-t G14-N14-N33 | {{ill|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|de|Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cheri-cheped-Kenmut|qid=Q972923|1=Cheri-cheped-Kenmut}}
''Ḫrj-ḫpd-n-Knm.t'' | ''Bearer of the Rear of Kenmet'' |- | style="text-align:center"|33 | F4:t-Z1-U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Hat-djat|de|Hat-djat|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hat-djat|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}
''Ḥ3t-ḏ3t'' | ''The One at the Peak'' |- | style="text-align:center"|34 | F22-G43-Z1*Z1 U28-M17-M17-t N14-N33:N33:N33 | {{ill|Pehui-djat|de|Pehui-djat|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pehui-djat|qid=Q2067507|1=Pehui-djat}}
''Pḥ.wj-ḏ3jt'' | ''???'' |- |} == See also == * {{ill|Diagonal star clock EA47605|de|Diagonalsternuhr EA47605|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clock EA47605|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clock EA47605|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clock EA47605|qid=Q1208201|1=Diagonal star clock EA47605}} * {{ill|C Decan Lists|de|Dekanlisten C|1=Decan List C|2=de|3=Dekanlisten C|1=Decan List C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/C Decan Lists|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/de|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Dekanlisten C|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/C Decan Lists|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/C Decan Lists|13=User:Immanuelle/Decan List C|qid=Q1183637}} * {{ill|Sarcophagus of Heni|de|Sarg des Heni|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarcophagus of Heni|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarcophagus of Heni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarcophagus of Heni|qid=Q1720616|1=Sarcophagus of Heni}} == Literature == * {{ill|Jochem Kahl|en|Jochem Kahl|qid=Q1691027|lt=Jochem Kahl|1=Jochem Kahl}}: ''Siut-Theben: Zur Wertschätzung von Traditionen im Alten Ägypten''. Brill, Leiden 1999, ISBN 90-04-11441-6 {{translated page|de|Dekanlisten A1|version=191425530|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Dekanlisten A1]] [[de:Decanlists A1]] [[ja:デカンリストA1]] [[ja:Dekanlisten A1]] {{wikidata link|Q1183634}}
